name: Slybroadcast API
description: Slybroadcast provides a ringless voicemail delivery service. The API allows sending voicemail campaigns, managing campaigns (pause, resume, stop, cancel), retrieving campaign results and reports, managing audio files, and maintaining a Do Not Dial list. All campaign and management requests go to the /vmb.php endpoint via POST with form data. Different operations are distinguished by the c_option or other parameters in the request body. Requires TLS 1.1 or higher.
